title: Senior Plant Manager at Luminous Power Technologies

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Luminous Power Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Plant Manager looking for your next big career move? Luminous Power Technologies in Ahmedabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Luminous Power Technologies:
Luminous Power Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Luminous Power Technologies!
